case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. HARRIS, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 455 EDDY ST #E-1605, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522.

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, PAUL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, PAUL
